keyboard_equivalent.notes: The publish command remains discoverable by command id even when policy blocks activation.

why_unavailable.summary: Publishing extensions is blocked by managed policy for this workspace scope.
why_unavailable.safe_next_step: Open policy detail to see the owning rule and the allowed publish routes.

__fixture__.name: policy_locked_button
__fixture__.scenario: A policy-owned action is rendered as locked, not disabled, and includes a why-unavailable explanation plus an inspect route to policy detail.
contract_sections: Actionability: disabled vs locked vs pending vs preview-first
